a with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals negative 8 i with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top plus 4 j with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top plus k with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top space space d a n space space b with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals negative 4 i with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top minus 4 j with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top plus m k with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top space space a d a l a h space 1 third
